name: mem0-forget
tagline: Deletes mem0 memories by search query or ID, with mandatory confirmation before removal.
verdict: Simple, safe deletion flow: explicit confirmation required before any delete, clear reporting of failures, and a session-scoped undo path. Only gaps are missing out-of-scope guidance and no version/changelog signal for the skill itself.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere in the skill.
No version field and no changelog/dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
